constraints: High environmental sensitivity and clearance requirements
demo_locations.explanation: Kolkata scores highest due to existing port infrastructure, navigable channel access, rail and road connectivity, and logistics park proximity. Both inland port and hub-spoke models return HIGH assessments.

constraints: High urban density limits terminal expansion
demo_locations.explanation: Patna scores highest for hub-spoke logistics due to regional centrality, rail junction access, and multi-modal connectivity. Urban density limits greenfield terminal options for inland port use.

constraints: High ecological sensitivity in Ganga corridor
demo_locations.explanation: Varanasi has an existing multi-modal terminal providing immediate operational capability. Consistently strong across all three use case models. Ecological sensitivity is manageable with clearance compliance.
